---
description: "Pick up the next incomplete phase in the upgrade plan and implement it step by step"
argument-hint: "Optional: phase number or specific step to start from (e.g. 'Phase 2' or 'step 3')"
agent: "agent"
---

Review [UPGRADE_PLAN.md](../../UPGRADE_PLAN.md) and identify the next incomplete phase (first milestone not marked ✅).

Then:

1. State which phase and milestone you are starting, and summarize its goal in one sentence.
2. Work through each numbered step in that phase in order.
3. After completing each step, briefly confirm what was done before moving to the next.
4. When all steps in the phase are done, verify against the milestone criteria listed in the plan.
5. If verification passes, mark the milestone as ✅ Done in [UPGRADE_PLAN.md](../../UPGRADE_PLAN.md) and stop — do not start the next phase without user approval.

Follow all conventions in [../.github/copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md) and the relevant instruction files for any files you touch.
